mapper.select: select custid, contractno, dept_cd, dept_name, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name, DATE_FORMAT(contract_opn_dt,'%Y/%m/%d') as contract_opn_dt, DATE_FORMAT(contract_close_dt,'%Y/%m/%d') as contract_close_dt, pd_cd, pd_nm, status, actid, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_nm, birth_dt, cb_dt, cust_pin, inst_cd, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, DATE_FORMAT(actrole_end_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as actrole_end_date, DATE_FORMAT(archive_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as archive_date, DATE_FORMAT(delete_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as delete_date, DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as arc_del_date, DATE_FORMAT(real_doc_del_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as real_doc_del_date, real_doc_del_userid from cotdl.tbl_piicontract order by dept_cd, custid, contractno
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piicontract (custid, contractno, dept_cd, dept_name, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name, contract_opn_dt, contract_close_dt, pd_cd, pd_nm, status, actid, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_nm, birth_dt, cb_dt, cust_pin, inst_cd, basedate, actrole_end_date, archive_date, delete_date, arc_del_date, real_doc_del_date, real_doc_del_userid) values (#{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mgmt_dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mgmt_dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{contract_opn_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d') ,to_date(#{contract_close_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d') , #{pd_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pd_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rsdnt_altrntv_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cb_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_pin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inst_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{actrole_end_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{archive_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{delete_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{arc_del_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{real_doc_del_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{real_doc_del_userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_piicontract (custid, contractno, dept_cd, dept_name, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name, contract_opn_dt, contract_close_dt, pd_cd, pd_nm, status, actid, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_nm, birth_dt, cb_dt, cust_pin, inst_cd, basedate, actrole_end_date, archive_date, delete_date, arc_del_date, real_doc_del_date, real_doc_del_userid) values (#{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mgmt_dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mgmt_dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{contract_opn_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d') ,to_date(#{contract_close_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d') , #{pd_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pd_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rsdnt_altrntv_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cb_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_pin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inst_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{actrole_end_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{archive_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{delete_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{arc_del_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{real_doc_del_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{real_doc_del_userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select custid, contractno, dept_cd, dept_name, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name, DATE_FORMAT(contract_opn_dt,'%Y/%m/%d') as contract_opn_dt, DATE_FORMAT(contract_close_dt,'%Y/%m/%d') as contract_close_dt, pd_cd, pd_nm, status, actid, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_nm, birth_dt, cb_dt, cust_pin, inst_cd, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, DATE_FORMAT(actrole_end_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as actrole_end_date, DATE_FORMAT(archive_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as archive_date, DATE_FORMAT(delete_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as delete_date, DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as arc_del_date, DATE_FORMAT(real_doc_del_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as real_doc_del_date, real_doc_del_userid from cotdl.tbl_piicontract where custid= #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and contractno= #{contractno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piicontract where custid= #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and contractno= #{contractno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piicontract set dept_cd= #{dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name= #{dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mgmt_dept_cd= #{mgmt_dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mgmt_dept_name= #{mgmt_dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contract_opn_dt= str_to_date(#{contract_opn_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), contract_close_dt= str_to_date(#{contract_close_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), pd_cd= #{pd_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pd_nm= #{pd_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, actid= #{actid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rsdnt_altrntv_id= #{rsdnt_altrntv_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cust_nm= #{cust_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birth_dt= #{birth_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cb_dt= #{cb_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cust_pin= #{cust_pin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inst_cd= #{inst_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, basedate= str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), actrole_end_date= str_to_date(#{actrole_end_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), archive_date= str_to_date(#{archive_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), delete_date= str_to_date(#{delete_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), arc_del_date= str_to_date(#{arc_del_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), real_doc_del_date= str_to_date(#{real_doc_del_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), real_doc_del_userid= #{real_doc_del_userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where custid= #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and contractno= #{contractno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select custid, contractno, dept_cd, dept_name, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name, DATE_FORMAT(contract_opn_dt,'%Y/%m/%d') as contract_opn_dt, DATE_FORMAT(contract_close_dt,'%Y/%m/%d') as contract_close_dt, pd_cd, pd_nm, status, actid, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_nm, birth_dt, cb_dt, cust_pin, inst_cd, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, DATE_FORMAT(actrole_end_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as actrole_end_date, DATE_FORMAT(archive_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as archive_date, DATE_FORMAT(delete_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as delete_date, DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as arc_del_date, DATE_FORMAT(real_doc_del_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as real_doc_del_date, real_doc_del_userid from cotdl.tbl_piicontract
order by dept_cd, custid, contractno limit #{offset}, #{amount}

select count(1) from( select DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date,'%Y/%m') as mon, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name from cotdl.tbl_piicontract
group by DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date,'%Y/%m'), mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name ) a where mon is not null
select chartname, mon, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name, acount, ncount, ycount, progress from COTDL.TBL_PIICONTRACTSTAT where chartname = 'MONTHLY'
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.TBL_PIICONTRACTSTAT select 'MONTHLY', mon, '*' as mgmt_dept_cd, '*' as mgmt_dept_name, acount, ncount, ycount, concat(ROUND(ycount/acount,1)*100,'%') as progress from( select DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date,'%Y/%m') as mon/*, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name*/ , count(1) as acount, COUNT(case when status = 'N' then 1 end) as ncount, COUNT(case when status = 'Y' then 1 end) as ycount from cotdl.tbl_piicontract where arc_del_date >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 12 MONTH) group by DATE_FORMAT(arc_del_date,'%Y/%m')/*, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name*/ ) a where mon is not null order by mon /*, mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name*/
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT mgmt_dept_cd, mgmt_dept_name FROM cotdl.tbl_piicontract WHERE mgmt_dept_cd IS NOT NULL AND mgmt_dept_cd != '' ORDER BY mgmt_dept_name
